headline: Hims to cut 4% of workforce amid ban on weight-loss drug copies
summary: NEW YORK (Reuters) -Telehealth platform Hims & Hers said on Friday it will cut 68 employees, or about 4% of its workforce, as it adjusts to a U.S. ban on manufacturing mass copies of the weight-loss drug Wegovy.  A U.S. Food and Drug Administration ban on compounded copies of Wegovy, made by Novo Nordisk, took effect on May 22.  The company said it is seeking new opportunities for growth, including an agreement with Novo to help patients access Wegovy.
